trades.reasoning: Score 90 with RSI 64.8 in the bullish sweet spot and MACD bullish crossover; solar energy recovery play with price 8.3% above SMA-20 and meaningful room before overbought territory.

decisions.briefing: Markets were mildly positive today with NASDAQ up 0.9% and S&P 500 up 0.5%, a neutral backdrop suitable for selective deployment. With 4 open slots and $943 in cash above the $500 threshold, I'm adding SEDG which has the cleanest technical setup among score-90 candidates — bullish RSI, MACD crossover, and not yet overbought. Existing six holdings appear healthy with no stop-loss or profit-target triggers visible.

market_education.summary_en: Markets drifted modestly higher in a low-conviction session, with technology leading the advance as NASDAQ gained 0.9% while the broader S&P 500 added 0.5%. No single macro catalyst dominated the session, suggesting the gains were driven by rotation into growth names and short-covering rather than fresh fundamental news. The persistent spread between NASDAQ and S&P 500 performance reflects investors continuing to favor higher-growth technology stocks over the broader market.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日市場呈現溫和上漲格局，科技股領漲帶動納斯達克指數上升0.9%，標普500指數則上漲0.5%。整體市場缺乏明確宏觀催化劑，漲勢主要由板塊輪動及空頭回補推動，而非源於新的基本面消息。納斯達克與標普500之間持續存在的漲幅差距，反映投資者在當前環境下持續偏好成長型科技股，勝於大盤整體表現。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing is a strategy of buying stocks showing strong recent price and technical strength, betting that trending stocks continue to trend. The ideal entry is an RSI between 55–70 (buying pressure present but not yet overbought) paired with a bullish MACD crossover — which is exactly why SEDG was selected today over higher-RSI candidates like VICR (RSI 86.9) that carry mean-reversion risk.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資策略是指買入近期價格走勢強勁、技術指標向好的股票，押注強者恆強的市場規律。理想的進場點是RSI介於55至70之間（具備買盤動力但尚未超買），並同時出現MACD金叉訊號——這正是今日選擇SEDG而非RSI已達86.9的VICR等候選股的原因，後者面臨較高的均值回歸風險。
